originalTitle: Cyclops: The Fearless Leader | Character Reveal Trailer | Marvel Rivals
content: Husband. Leader. Mutant. 🕶️ As a founding member of the X-Men, Scott Summers is no stranger to hardship and discipline. Having overcome discrimination and tribulation, he stands as an unyielding protector of Mutantkind. Through his specialized ruby quartz visor, he's able to precisely control the devastating force channeled through his eyes, neutralizing any threat on the battlefield. Cross him and all restraint disappears, unleashing an unstoppable torrent of concussive energy! He's the one in charge for a reason. Find out why as Cyclops arrives with Season 8.5 of Marvel Rivals on June 12th! 💥 Play free now on: 🔹 Steam: https://t.co/IPhy0Of1cG 🔹 PlayStation: https://t.co/FR0aVfTmcn 🔹 Xbox: https://t.co/GaAYz7Nku6 🔹 Epic Games: https://t.co/QXoxz0VAP7 Follow #MarvelRivals for the latest news: 🔹 Discord: https://discord.gg/marvelrivals 🔹 X: https://x.com/MarvelRivals 🔹 Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/marvelrivals/ 🔹 Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/marvelrivals/ 🔹 TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@marvelrivals 🔹 Twitch: https://www.twitch.tv/marvelrivals 🔹 Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/marvelrivalsglobal.bsky.social 🔹 Threads: https://www.threads.net/@marvelrivals #MarvelRivals

chineseContent: 丈夫。领导者。突变体。 🕶️ 作为 X 战警的创始成员，斯科特·萨默斯 (Scott Summers) 对困难和纪律并不陌生。在克服了歧视和磨难之后，他成为了变种人不屈的保护者。通过他特制的红宝石石英护目镜，他能够精确控制通过眼睛传递的毁灭性力量，消除战场上的任何威胁。越过他，一切束缚都会消失，释放出一股不可阻挡的震荡能量洪流！他是负责人是有原因的。了解原因，独眼巨人将于 6 月 12 日随 Marvel Rivals 第 8.5 季登场！ 💥 立即免费畅玩： 🔹 Steam：https://t.co/IPhy0Of1cG 🔹 PlayStation：https://t.co/FR0aVfTmcn 🔹 Xbox：https://t.co/GaAYz7Nku6 🔹 Epic Games：https://t.co/QXoxz0VAP7 关注#MarvelRivals 了解最新消息： 🔹 Discord： https://discord.gg/marvelrivals 🔹 X：https://x.com/MarvelRivals 🔹 Instagram：https://www.instagram.com/marvelrivals/ 🔹 Facebook：https://www.facebook.com/marvelrivals/ 🔹 TikTok：https://www.tiktok.com/@marvelrivals 🔹 Twitch： https://www.twitch.tv/marvelrivals 🔹 Bluesky：https://bsky.app/profile/marvelrivalsglobal.bsky.social 🔹 主题：https://www.threads.net/@marvelrivals #MarvelRivals
